error.signature: launch.invalid_launch_file_error.InvalidLaunchFileError: Caught exception when trying to load file

verdict.summary: ROS 2 launch file has a Python syntax error or incorrect launch API usage.

dead_ends.action: Convert ROS 1 XML launch directly to ROS 2 XML without API changes
dead_ends.why_fails: ROS 2 XML launch uses different tags and attribute names than ROS 1

dead_ends.action: Use print() for debugging inside launch descriptions
dead_ends.why_fails: Launch descriptions are declarative; print() runs at parse time not launch time

workarounds.action: Use ros2 launch --print to validate syntax without executing
Follow Python launch template with LaunchDescription and Node action
workarounds.how: from launch import LaunchDescription; from launch_ros.actions import Node

workarounds.action: Read the full traceback - the actual Python error is at the bottom
